title: Tennet Sionaro
content:
{{Top|leg}}
Dr. '''Tennet Sionaro''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologist]] with the Archaeology Department of [[Coronet University]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:CASM">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Coronet Archaeology Site Menaced}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Dr. Sionaro and a field team were busy excavating in a remote area of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They were searching for a supposed network of [[Selonian Tunnels]] that apparently predated the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. Although Sionaro's colleagues were skeptical, their research seemed to show promise. But then a herd of local animals started to endanger the team's encampment, which upset the students and threatened to drastically set back the doctor's schedule. After an appeal to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] for help was declined, Coronet University granted additional stipend to pay a well-armed individual for eliminating the creatures. Sionaro used the money to hire a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who hunted and killed the creatures and so permitted the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] to continue his or her research.<ref name="SWG:CASM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dr. Sionaro is the creator of a mission in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] called "Coronet Archaeology Site Menaced" that was available on Mission Terminals on Corellia.<ref name="SWG:CASM" />
